title: OP Items by EightRock165352
description: This mod adds very powerful and useful equipment and food.
body:
# OP Items by EightRock165352

This Minecraft mod adds the strongest vanilla-like gear without the need for additional mods.
- OP Food - ALL

The strongest food in the game, it fully restores hunger and provides a massive buff for 60 minutes.
- OP Armor

This is the strongest armor with a strength of over 1024, providing constant buffs.
- OP Paxel

A multi-tool with an attack power of 99,999, suitable for both block destruction and battle.
